title: Manufacturing Engineer - ACC Limited - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - ACC Limited - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
ACC Limited is actively seeking a talented and motivated Manufacturing Engineer to join our dynamic team in Agra. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About ACC Limited:
ACC Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in ISO 9001

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ACC Limited!
